User avatar with image, initials fallback, and optional status indicator.
- src      (string)  : Image URL. If absent, shows initials fallback.
- alt      (string)  : Alt text for the image. Default: user.name or ''
- initials (string)  : 1–2 character initials shown when no image.
- name     (string)  : Full name (used for aria-label and auto-initials if needed).
- status   (string)  : 'online' | 'offline' | 'away' | 'busy'. Shows status dot if set.
- badge    (string)  : Short badge text (e.g. count) overlaid on avatar.
- group    (boolean) : Set true when avatar is part of an AvatarGroup (removes outer margin).
{# Auto-generate initials from name if not explicitly provided #}
